heading: Charter or sale of vessels acquired by Department of Transportation
label: 57504 Charter or sale of vessels acquired by Department of Transportation
text: Vessels transferred to or otherwise acquired by the Department of Transportation in any manner may be chartered or sold by the Secretary of Transportation as provided in this chapter.
